description.value: Plants in area animate and grasp at creatures. Creatures in area when cast or entering make [[/save type=reflex]]. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. If you have more, target becomes Restrained ([[/save type=reflex]]). Repeat save at end of affected player turn (1 success ends effect).

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = Fails
- 1 = 1 round (10ft square)
- 2 = 1 minute (20ft square)
- 3 = 10 minutes (30ft square)
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
